extraction.one_line_summary: RODRIGUEZ Carlos attacked over top of Col du Plan with 5-second descent gap, held off POGACAR and VINGEGAARD who watched each other instead of chasing.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma burned domestiques on penultimate climb, forcing Yates/Bilbao to chase back, pre-weakening rivals before final ascent.
POGACAR attacked 3.7km from summit but VINGEGAARD refused to work, sitting on wheel enabled RODRIGUEZ escape.
RODRIGUEZ exploited GC stalemate by attacking immediately over summit, converting 5-second gap through superior descending skills.
Bonus seconds at summit (8-5-2) created tactical dilemma: POGACAR forced to lead out sprint, gifting VINGEGAARD positioning advantage.

rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: First foreign win converts to Alpine stage victory, descending superiority over GC favorites suggests underrated podium threat
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: negative: Struggled to hold contact on penultimate climb despite top-10 GC position, fading from overall contention
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: Required teammate Harper rescue after Jumbo pacing, gap suggests insufficient form for podium defense
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: Lost podium spot by one second to Rodriguez, held GC group but showed no attacking capacity
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: negative: Dropped on penultimate climb, confirming top-5 GC ceiling against Jumbo attrition tactics
